message:
feat(testing): expand test enrichment across resilience, attack surface, and runtime decision modules

Attack Surface Game Model (attack_surface_game_model.rs, +417 lines):
- Add minimax edge cases: single defender, symmetric losses,
  deterministic tie-breaking
- Test LossTensor builder completeness and report generation
- Validate subsystem coverage and dimension enumeration

Test262 Runner (franken_test262_runner.rs, +491 lines):
- Expand CLI test coverage: argument parsing, output formatting,
  result aggregation, filter expressions
- Add conformance snapshot comparison tests

Test Flake Quarantine Workflow (test_flake_quarantine_workflow.rs, +340 lines):
- Add quarantine entry/exit lifecycle tests
- Test flake detection heuristics and cooldown periods
- Validate quarantine report generation and history pruning

Runtime Decision Core (runtime_decision_core.rs, +226 lines):
- Add DecisionCoreError Display coverage for all 5 variants
- Test decision pipeline under various lane configurations
- Validate epoch regression detection

Supporting modules:
- causal_replay.rs: Expand replay determinism and ordering tests
- anti_entropy.rs, cut_line_automation.rs, e2e_harness.rs,
  rgc_test_harness.rs, tropical_semiring.rs: Test enrichment with
  serde roundtrips, edge cases, and Display format verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
